title: galactites × rigualii
intro: Galactites × rigualii, also known as Sticky Milkwort or Fagonbey, is a plant species in the figwort family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galactites × rigualii include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce congestion, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory allergies. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to create a syrup, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
